Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze the given underfitting process tree It has a sequence create req approve req then a parallel block containing create po receive goods receive invoice match invoice pay invoice then close case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The parallel block allows all those activities to be interleaved arbitrarily

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In a proper Procure to Pay process there are dependencies after approval you create PO

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then you receive goods and receive invoice these can happen in any order Actually goods receipt and invoice receipt are independent But the matching process requires both

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also paying should happen after matching

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the correct order is create PO then receive goods and receive invoice can be in parallel but both must happen before matching Then match then pay

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So a sequence create po then a parallel of receive goods and receive invoice then match then pay then close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The underfitting models parallel block allows paying before receiving goods etc Thats unwanted

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Thus we need to replace the parallel block with a sequence that enforces dependencies

Name: Validation - PE
Text: No choices are necessary because all activities must happen exactly once

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In the given model the parallel block includes create po but create po should be before the others So we need to move create po out of parallel
